name: aws-vault
description: A vault for securely storing and accessing AWS credentials in development environments

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add credentials to the secure keystore

args.name: profile
args.description: The profile you want to add

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove credentials from the secure keystore

name: -f
--force
options.description: Force-remove the profile without a prompt

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List profiles, along with their credentials and sessions

options.name: --credentials
options.description: Show only the profiles with stored credential

name: -n
--no-session
options.description: Use master credentials, no session or role used

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: Execute a command with AWS credentials

name: -d
--duration
options.description: Duration of the temporary or assume-role session. Defaults to 1h

name: -n
--no-session
options.description: Use master credentials, no session or role used

subcommands.name: clear
subcommands.description: Clear temporary credentials from the secure keystore

subcommands.name: login
subcommands.description: Generate a login link for the AWS Console
